com.hp.workpath.api.scanner

Class ScanAttributes.ScanToUriBuilder<T extends ScanAttributes.ScanToUriBuilder<T>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder<T>
      • com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.ScanToUriBuilder<T>
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    ScanAttributes.FtpBuilder, ScanAttributes.HttpBuilder, ScanAttributes.NetworkFolderBuilder
    Enclosing class:
    ScanAttributes

    public abstract static class ScanAttributes.ScanToUriBuilder<T extends ScanAttributes.ScanToUriBuilder<T>>
extends ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder<T>
    Builder for creating ScanAttributes configured to send scanned images to the external HTTP(S) server.
    Since:
    API 1

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      T setConnectTimeout(int connectTimeout)
      Sets the socket connect timeout - how much time to wait before socket will be opened when sending scanned file
      Default value is 60 seconds.
      Range: 1 ~ 300 seconds.
      T setMaxConsecutiveRetries(int maxRetries)
      Sets the maximum number of times to retry an attempt to access the uri.
      T setNetworkCredentials(NetworkCredentialsAttributes networkCredentialsAttributes)
      Sets the network credentials to access destination URI
      T setReadTimeout(int readTimeout)
      Sets the socket read timeout - how much time to wait before data becomes available to read from socket when sending scanned file Default value is 60 seconds.
      Range: 1 ~ 300 seconds.
      T setRetryInterval(int retryInterval)
      Sets the minimum number of seconds to wait before attempting a retry.
      Default value is 60 seconds.
      Range: 1 ~ 300 seconds.

      • Methods inherited from class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.ScanAttributesBuilder

        build, setAutomaticStraightenMode, setAutomaticToneMode, setBackgroundCleanup, setBlankImageRemovalMode, setCaptureMode, setColorDropoutMode, setColorMode, setContrastAdjustment, setCredentials, setCropMode, setCustomLength, setCustomWidth, setDarknessAdjustment, setDocumentFormat, setDuplex, setEraseBackMargin, setEraseFrontMargin, setEraseMarginUnit, setFileName, setFileOptionsAttributes, setJobAssemblyMode, setMaxPagesPerAttachment, setMediaSource, setMediaWeightAdjustment, setMisfeedDetectionMode, setOrientation, setOutputQuality, setProgressDialogMode, setResolution, setScanPreview, setScanSize, setSharpnessAdjustment, setSplitAttachmentByPage, setTextPhotoOptimization, setTransmissionMode

    • Method Detail

      • setNetworkCredentials

        public T setNetworkCredentials(NetworkCredentialsAttributes networkCredentialsAttributes)
        Sets the network credentials to access destination URI
        Parameters:
        networkCredentialsAttributes - network credentials attributes containing authentication parameters
        Returns:
        builder
        Since:
        API 1

      • setConnectTimeout

        public T setConnectTimeout(int connectTimeout)
        Sets the socket connect timeout - how much time to wait before socket will be opened when sending scanned file
        Default value is 60 seconds.
        Range: 1 ~ 300 seconds.
        Parameters:
        connectTimeout - value in seconds
        Returns:
        builder
        Since:
        API 1

      • setReadTimeout

        public T setReadTimeout(int readTimeout)
        Sets the socket read timeout - how much time to wait before data becomes available to read from socket when sending scanned file Default value is 60 seconds.
        Range: 1 ~ 300 seconds.
        Parameters:
        readTimeout - value in seconds
        Returns:
        builder
        Since:
        API 1

      • setMaxConsecutiveRetries

        public T setMaxConsecutiveRetries(int maxRetries)
        Sets the maximum number of times to retry an attempt to access the uri. A value of 0 indicates no retry if the first attempt fails.
        Default value is 0 (no retries).
        Range: 0 ~ 5 times.
        Parameters:
        maxRetries - how many retries the device must take when sending the scanned file to URI before failing
        Returns:
        builder
        Since:
        API 1

      • setRetryInterval

        public T setRetryInterval(int retryInterval)
        Sets the minimum number of seconds to wait before attempting a retry.
        Default value is 60 seconds.
        Range: 1 ~ 300 seconds.
        Parameters:
        retryInterval - seconds to wait between retries
        Returns:
        builder
        Since:
        API 1
